reviews.comment:
Cada vez que venimos un montón de demora, un solo empleado para atender las dos Islas, lamentable, más de media hora esperando para una carga.

(Translated by Google)
Every time we come there's a huge delay, only one employee to serve both islands, it's awful, we waited more than half an hour for a load.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwNzgzNXpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La única en kilómetros a la redonda. A las q0 de la noche cierra en Shop y los baños.  Y queda un solo playero haciendo malabares con filas de autos que supera la cuadra. Media pila YPF

(Translated by Google)
The only one for miles around. At 10:00 p.m., the shop and restrooms close. And only one beachcomber remains, juggling lines of cars that stretch for a block. Half a pile of YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwODV2Tmx3RRAB
